Meta.description: Community dishes forked to fit your constraints.

Home.title: Discover dishes
Home.discoverSubtitle: Browse community recipes, find your next meal
Home.description: Browse community recipes, customize by allergies, equipment, and cooking time.
Home.heroDescription: Don't know what to eat or how to make it? ForkFit intelligently picks from community recipes, adjusts for your taste, allergies, and time — generating your personalized version in one click.
Home.problemDesc: It's not that you can't cook — it's not knowing what to cook or how to make it fit your body and taste.
Home.problem1Desc: Scrolling food apps for 20 minutes, then ordering the same old thing. Every day is a battle with "what to eat."
Home.problem2Desc: Peanut allergy in the family, lactose intolerance yourself. Finding a safe AND tasty recipe is exhausting.
Home.problem3Desc: Recipe says 30 min, actual cooking takes an hour. Busy people don't have that kind of time.
Home.howDesc: No recipe research, no memorizing formulas. Tell AI your taste, we handle the rest.
Home.howStep1Desc: Discover real recipes shared by others, check reviews and methods, find something that interests you.
Home.howStep2Desc: Tell AI your taste preferences, allergies, equipment, and time limits — get a personalized version instantly.
Home.howStep3Desc: Get the full adapted recipe: what changed, why, shopping list, detailed steps — just follow along.
Home.featureDesc: AI doesn't replace your cooking — it makes every dish fit you better.
Home.feature1Desc: Rigorously checks every ingredient to ensure zero allergens. Every rule you set is enforced — AI never misses.
Home.feature2Desc: See a recipe you like? Fork it to adjust for your taste. Less spice, swap ingredients, cut time — AI preserves the soul of the dish.
Home.feature3Desc: Every dish you save, like, or fork — AI learns from it. The more you use it, the more precise the recommendations become.
Home.feature4Desc: Only 15 minutes? AI auto-adjusts steps and portions to fit your timeframe. No flavor sacrifice, just process optimization.
Home.showcaseDesc: AI doesn't just swap ingredient names. It analyzes the original recipe, checks your constraints, and generates an adaptation plan.
Home.showcaseStep1Desc: AI checks your allergies, dietary rules, available equipment, and time limits — flags what needs changing.
Home.showcaseStep2Desc: Minimizes changes while preserving the original flavor. Swaps allergens, adjusts portions, reorders steps.
Home.showcaseStep3Desc: View a Before / After comparison: what changed and why. Every adjustment has a reason — you can fine-tune.
Home.showcaseStep4Desc: Auto-generates a shopping list and detailed cooking steps. Take your phone to the grocery store, come back and cook.
Home.testimonial1Text: The most annoying part of my day used to deciding what to eat. Now I open ForkFit, browse a recipe, fork it, and get a version I can actually eat. Game changer.
Home.testimonial2Text: Essential for families with kids. Fork a dish, remove chili and nuts, and the kids can eat it too. No more cooking two separate meals.
Home.testimonial3Text: As someone who can only make instant noodles, ForkFit taught me 5 dishes. The steps are crystal clear — just follow along.
Home.ctaTitle: Stop stressing about what to eat
Home.ctaDescription: Sign up, set your taste preferences, and AI remembers everything. The more you use it, the better it knows you.

Pack.forkDescription: Adapt it to a user profile with the ForkFit worker.
Pack.author: Author

Fork.title: Customize「{title}」
Fork.description: Uses your taste profile to adjust this dish. You can also tweak it here.
Fork.oneClickDescription: Automatically adjusts this dish to your taste and preferences.

Profile.title: Profile
Profile.description: Save your usual constraints and preferences. Fork pages use this as the starting point.

NewPost.title: Create post
NewPost.description: Write the dish like a normal post. Details can stay empty for now.
NewPost.imageHelp: One URL per line. The first image becomes the cover.
NewPost.detailsHelp: Optional for now. Later this can be inferred from the description.
NewPost.publishHelp: Published posts appear in Discover and can be forked by other users.
NewPost.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the dish, method, taste, serving context, and substitutions like a normal post.

Run.title: Fork result
Run.workerMessage: The worker is adapting this dish.
Run.needsInputDescription: Some ingredients or equipment couldn't be automatically adapted. Choose a substitute below to continue.
Run.noSteps: No steps generated. The agent will create them for you.
Run.shoppingListHelp: Merged ingredients from all dishes. Duplicate items are marked with ×.
Run.addImagesHelp: Upload photos of your dish (optional, max 4).
Run.originalPostHint: Personalized version based on this post

Auth.avatarUrlHelp: Paste an image URL for your profile picture.
Auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
Auth.usernameInvalid: Username must be 3-60 characters, letters, numbers, and underscores only.

Admin.title: Admin Dashboard
Admin.author: Author
Admin.accessDeniedDesc: You do not have admin privileges.
Admin.confirmDeleteUser: Delete user "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
Admin.confirmDeletePost: Delete post "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
Admin.confirmBatchDelete: Delete {count} items? This cannot be undone.
